HI STORY OF PRESENT LLNESS: This is a 54-year-old with past medical history of end-stage

her Plavix and aspirin. She went on the toilet. When she tried to get up, she fell.
Then was having left leg pain. Unable to anbul ate. She could not go to dialysis, missed
